sections.title: Before talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, how's it go...

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Sorry my friend, the Skipper has been grindin' me up the wrong way lately. If ye need anythin', talk t' Cap'ain Pudi over by the dock.

sections.title: After talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: That ungrateful Skipper. How dare he blame me for that freak storm?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you angry at the Skipper?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: It be a long story.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got time. I would love to hear it.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Fine, 'ere be me tale of misfortune.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: About a half moon ago, we set sail on our fortnightly fishin' trip. 'Twas smooth sailin' all the way t' our spot.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Caught a load of manta ray an' snappers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a snapper?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Ah, I should'a realised you were a landlubber. We on the ship call them snappers, but you lot call 'em lobsters.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Anyway, back to me tale.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: After a couple o' days, we pulled up the anchor an' sailed closer t' the Karamjan coast. There is where the big'ns are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a big'n?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: You landlubbers... It be a shark.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, how was I supposed to know?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: CAN YOU STOP INTERRUPTIN' ME TALE?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok...

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Good, now where was I...

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: When we arrived at the spot, the Skipper saw a lack of fish swimmin' in the waters.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: I looked yonder onto the horizon an' noticed a storm was a brewin', so we adjusted our course accordin'.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: As if by magic, winds started a blowin' an' the storm started movin' in our direction.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Lightnin' struck the boat, an' a piece of wood holdin' up the sail fell an' struck me on the 'ead.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: I woke up in a bed an' the Skipper started on me, tellin' me I ruined his ship an' I need t' pay him back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's awful. He does not sound like a nice man.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Nay, he usually is. He be upset about his ship, is all.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Can I help ye with anythin' else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for fighting Tempoross?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Watch out for the waves. If ye get hit by that you could end up lost at sea.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Ye might find tying yourself t' somethin' using a rope t' be a life saver.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Or if ye manage to get yer hands on one of them there fancy Spirity Angler outfits, it comes with a built- in rope harness.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Can I help ye with anythin' else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Have a good'n. I know I won't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Oh, a damp egg! Yes, please!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait, really?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Aye, I'll add it t' me collection!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know there's a crate of them you could just help yourself t'...

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Hush! Don't let Timallus hear ye speak o' the damp egg crate. It'll set 'im off!

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Just pass me the egg.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Thank ye kindly!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: Oh, thanks.

lines.speaker: Koanee
lines.text: This is some comfort to be sure.
